title: Ashes & Light

sections.label: Intro
lines: From the ashes, we cry
Our hearts laid bare, under an empty sky

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: O God, the nations have trampled our name
Streets run with sorrow, consumed by shame
The temple is silent, its halls overthrown
Our cries echo, unheard, alone

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: How long, O Lord, will the shadows remain?
Your wrath burns bright, but mercy's refrain?

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Forgive, renew, remember our plea
Lift us from ruins, set our spirits free
For Your name, Your glory, Your light divine
In the desolation, let Your promise shine

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The young are taken, the old left to mourn
Our fields are barren, our flags are torn
But still, we hold to the hope of Your word
A flame in the dark, though faint, it is stirred

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Deliver us, O Shepherd of light
Through valleys of darkness, through endless night
Let justice roll, let mercy be known
Our souls are Yours, not stone

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Forgive, renew, remember our plea
Lift us from ruins, set our spirits free
For Your name, Your glory, Your light divine
In the desolation, let Your promise shine

sections.label: Outro
lines: From the ashes, we cry
Our hearts laid bare, under an empty sky

epigraph: LORD? wilt thou be angry for ever? shall thy jealousy burn like fire?
styleNote: Full Instrumentation Swells · Plaintive And Soaring · Soft Vocal Intensity
